// purpose: F5 debugger configs for PTOwl. Pair with the Dev API / Dev Web tasks in tasks.json — start the dev server first, then attach the debugger via F5 or the Run & Debug panel.

configurations.name: Debug API (attach to wrangler)
configurations.// note: Wrangler dev opens an inspector on 9229 by default. Start it first with the 'Dev API (wrangler)' task or `pnpm dev:api`, then F5 here.

configurations.name: Debug Web (Chrome)
configurations.// note: Start the Vite dev server first via the 'Dev Web (Vite)' task or `pnpm dev:web`, then F5 launches Chrome attached to the React app with source maps wired up.
